windows.embed_text_v2: Melting golden amber beeswax in clear glass bowl inside double boiler stainless pot of simmering water on gas stovetop, hand stirring molten wax with wooden stick
windows.summary_v2: Beeswax is melted in a glass bowl set inside a simmering stainless pot of water on a gas stove, then stirred with a wooden stick.

tags_v2.action: melting beeswax in a double boiler and stirring with a stick

seconds_v2.desc: On a black gas stovetop, a stainless steel pot of simmering water holds an inner clear glass bowl containing golden-amber melted beeswax in a double-boiler setup, steam rising.
Same double boiler; the glass bowl of molten amber beeswax sits in the gently boiling water bath, wax fully liquid and translucent gold.
Slightly closer handheld view of the glass bowl of liquid beeswax melting inside the steaming stainless pot on the gas burner.
Continued view of the amber melted wax in the inner glass bowl surrounded by bubbling water in the steel pot, stovetop grates visible.
Camera tilts in closer on the pot; the bowl of golden molten beeswax glows in the simmering water bath, steam and bubbles around it.
Tighter framing of the liquid beeswax pooled in the clear glass bowl, hot water and froth ringing it inside the stainless pot.
Close handheld shot looking down into the glass bowl of fully melted amber beeswax in the boiling-water double boiler.
Continued close view of the molten golden wax in the inner bowl, water simmering vigorously around the bowl in the pot.
A bare hand enters from the left holding a thin wooden stick/skewer and dips it into the bowl of melted beeswax to stir it within the water bath.

windows.embed_text_v2: Inspecting two finished yellow beeswax candles in clear glass mason jars with centered cotton wicks after curing on dark countertop, glossy pale yellow wax tops shown by hand.
windows.summary_v2: Two finished yellow beeswax mason-jar candles are presented and inspected on a dark countertop after curing.

seconds_v2.desc: Two finished yellow beeswax candles in clear glass mason jars on a dark countertop; right hand fingertips tilt the smaller front jar slightly to show the cured wax surface and centered cotton wick.
Hand has set the jar down; both jars now sit upright side by side, glossy pale-yellow beeswax tops with centered cotton wicks visible.
Camera angle shifts slightly; both yellow beeswax jar candles in frame, surfaces smooth and cured.
Slight zoom-in on the two jars; subtle sinkhole and wax pull-away from glass edges visible on each candle.
Continued close shot; pale yellow waxes contrast against dark speckled counter, wicks straight and centered.
Camera continues to study the finished pair; both candles cured with slight surface dips around the wicks.
Two finished yellow beeswax jar candles, glossy tops, viewed from front-right.
Same arrangement at marginally different angle; candles fully set.
Final shot of the cured yellow beeswax jar candles being inspected from above-front.

windows.embed_text_v2: Two finished set beeswax candles in clear glass jars with centered cotton wicks, hardened cream-yellow wax cooled on dark granite counter, displaying cured poured candles
windows.summary_v2: Slow pan across two finished beeswax candles set in clear glass jars with centered wicks, cooling on a dark countertop.

tags_v2.action: showing two finished set beeswax candles in glass jars

seconds_v2.desc: Two clear glass jars of set yellow beeswax candles sit on a dark granite counter, each with a centered cotton wick; the wax has cooled smooth with slight surface dips.
Slow pan across the two solidified beeswax jar candles, taller jar on the left and smaller wide jar on the right, creamy yellow wax and upright wicks.
Closer view of the two cured beeswax candles in glass jars, the right candle's domed set surface and wick clearly visible.
Continued pan over the pair of glass jar candles with hardened golden-yellow beeswax and trimmed central wicks on the speckled countertop.
The two finished beeswax candles in jars remain in frame, smooth set wax surfaces catching the light, wicks standing straight.
Tighter handheld view of both set beeswax jar candles, surface of the wax slightly uneven where it cooled, wicks centered.
Camera continues slowly across the two solidified yellow beeswax candles in their clear glass jars on the dark counter.
Pair of cooled beeswax jar candles shown close, the smaller right jar's rounded set top and wick prominent.
Final framing of the two finished beeswax candles in glass jars, hardened cream-yellow wax and upright wicks, a metal tool just visible behind them.

windows.embed_text_v2: Lighting a beeswax glass jar candle wick with a long green butane stem lighter on a wooden coaster, flame igniting amber wax pool, after showing two finished set jar candles
windows.summary_v2: After showing two set beeswax jar candles, the scene cuts to lighting a single jar candle's wick with a long stem lighter on a rustic table.

tags_v2.action: lighting a finished beeswax jar candle with a stem lighter

seconds_v2.desc: Continuation of the two set beeswax jar candles on dark granite, taller jar left and smaller jar right, cooled yellow wax and centered wicks.
Close pan over the pair of finished beeswax candles in glass jars, smooth set surfaces and upright wicks, a metal tool behind on the counter.
Last view of the two cured beeswax jar candles before the scene cuts away, golden-yellow wax filling the clear jars.

Cut to a single beeswax candle in a glass jar set on a square wooden coaster on a rustic wood plank table; pinecones sit in a blue dish at right and a long green-and-black stem lighter enters from the upper left toward the candle.
The long butane stem lighter is lowered over the jar candle's amber surface, tip approaching the wick; wood table and pinecone bowl in frame.
Lighter tip hovers just above the wick of the glass-jar beeswax candle, the wax surface glossy amber-yellow on the wooden coaster.
The stem lighter nears the wick to ignite it; a bare fingertip grips the green lighter body at top-left, candle and pinecones steady.
Lighter tip touches down at the wick of the jar candle, about to light it, molten amber sheen pooling at the center of the wax.
The candle wick catches: a small orange flame appears at the wick as the lighter ignites it, a melt pool of liquid amber wax forming around the flame in the glass jar.

windows.embed_text_v2: burning finished orange amber jar candle, single lit flame over melted wax pool in clear glass jar on wooden coasters, rustic dark wood table, butane lighter, basket of pinecones, autumnal decor
windows.summary_v2: A finished amber-orange jar candle burns steadily on a wooden coaster in a styled rustic tabletop still-life with a lighter and a basket of pinecones.

seconds_v2.desc: A finished amber-orange candle in a clear glass jar burns with a single flame, sitting on stacked wooden coasters atop a rustic dark-wood table; a green-and-black butane lighter lies to the left and a basket of pinecones to the right.
Static shot of the same lit orange candle on its wooden coaster; the flame flickers slightly while the melted wax pool glows near the rim of the glass jar.
The burning amber candle continues to glow in its glass jar; pinecones in a woven basket and the butane wand lighter frame the rustic wooden tabletop scene.
Close, slightly shifted view of the lit candle, its single flame steady above the molten orange wax inside the clear jar on the wood coasters.
The finished candle keeps burning; warm light from the flame reflects on the glass and the surrounding melted wax, with the lighter and pinecone basket still in frame.
Static b-roll of the glowing orange candle in its jar on the wooden table; flame flickers gently while wax glistens around the wick.
The lit amber candle continues to flicker on its coaster; the dark rustic wood, butane lighter, and basket of pinecones remain unchanged.
Burning orange candle in glass jar, flame upright over the melted wax pool, decoratively staged with pinecones and a lighter on the wooden surface.
Final frame of the steadily burning amber candle on its wooden coasters, the cozy autumnal still-life scene with pinecone basket and lighter unchanged.
